title: Charlotte Council Debates Property Tax Increase
summary: Charlotte City Council is considering raising property taxes, a move that has occurred only once in the last seven years.
charlotte_impact: Property tax changes impact residents' finances and city services, sparking debate over budget priorities.

title: Rowan Residents Demand Data Center Transparency
summary: Rowan County residents are seeking transparency from officials regarding a suspected data center project.
charlotte_impact: Lack of transparency erodes public trust and raises concerns about environmental and economic impacts.

title: Kidnapping Suspect Arrested in NC After Cheraw Incident
summary: A woman was found safe after being kidnapped in Cheraw, SC. The suspect, Kendrick Terry, was arrested in Richmond County, NC.
charlotte_impact: Kidnapping cases raise serious safety concerns and highlight the importance of law enforcement cooperation.

title: Weapons Found in Kindergarten Student's Backpack
summary: A pistol and knife were discovered in a kindergarten student's backpack at an Indian Land school. The student was reportedly unaware.
charlotte_impact: Weapons in schools raise serious safety concerns and prompt questions about security measures.

title: Woman Dies After Shooting in Albemarle
summary: A woman who was found shot in a car on Elizabeth Avenue in Albemarle has died, according to police reports.
charlotte_impact: Fatal shootings contribute to community fear and highlight the need for violence prevention efforts.

title: Heightened Wildfire Risk Across North Carolina
summary: Fire officials are warning of a heightened wildfire risk across North Carolina due to dry and windy conditions.
charlotte_impact: Wildfires pose a threat to property and public safety, requiring vigilance and preventative measures.

title: Lancaster Residents on Edge After Repeated Shootings
summary: Residents in a Lancaster neighborhood are living in fear due to repeated shootings in the area.
charlotte_impact: Repeated shootings erode community safety and create a climate of fear and anxiety for residents.

title: NC State Coach Wade Calls LSU Return "Personal"
summary: NC State head coach Will Wade describes his return to LSU as "deeply personal" amid reports of LSU's recruitment efforts.
charlotte_impact: Coaching changes and recruitment are part of the sports landscape, impacting team dynamics.

title: Capital Group to Open East Coast Hub in Charlotte
summary: Capital Group will open an East Coast hub in Charlotte, bringing 600 jobs and a $60 million investment.
charlotte_impact: New jobs and investment boost the local economy and create opportunities for residents.

title: SC Extends Tax Filing Deadline, Payment Still Due April 15
summary: South Carolina is extending its tax filing deadline to October, but the payment deadline remains April 15.
charlotte_impact: Tax deadlines and penalties impact individuals' financial obligations and require careful planning.

title: Rock Hill Man Sentenced for Transporting Minor for Sex
summary: Dai Quan Matthew Felix of Rock Hill was sentenced to 10 years for transporting a minor for sexual activity.
charlotte_impact: Child sex trafficking is a serious crime with devastating consequences for victims.

title: Mooresville Woman Faces Child Sex Abuse Charges
summary: Jonnie Ezara Wysong was charged with indecent liberties with a child in connection with an alleged sexual assault.
charlotte_impact: Child sex abuse cases are deeply disturbing and require thorough investigation and prosecution.

title: CMPD Investigating Northeast Charlotte Stabbing
summary: The Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police Department is investigating a stabbing incident in northeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Stabbing incidents contribute to community safety concerns and require police intervention.

title: Warm Weather Expected in Charlotte
summary: Charlotte is expecting beautiful weather on Thursday, followed by a very warm Friday, potentially breaking records.
charlotte_impact: Weather forecasts impact daily activities and planning for residents.

title: All-Clear Given at Weddington High After Threat
summary: Weddington High School was given the all-clear after a threat was investigated, with students moved to the football stadium.
charlotte_impact: School threats disrupt education and raise concerns about student safety and security protocols.
